name: Azur Lane RPG: The New Faction
description:
Not so long ago, the Sirens have intensified their attacks around the world, intriguing and worrying everyone about the origin of their growing aggression.

And while they're not entirely sure, they have the slight suspicion that you and your faction are the cause of the sirens' sudden change in behavior... As well as the Ashes faction.

Currently, all the faction leaders, along with some escorts, have gathered at the main base of Azur Lane, along with the commander, to discuss the events and actions to consider.

You, being the leader of your faction, or just a representative sent by it, will have to do everything possible to maintain a good image, and prove to your allies, both the Azur Lane alliance and Crimson Axis, that your faction is not guilty of the aggressiveness of the sirens... Right?

(I see coming that this won't work as planned, but we'll have to see if this works, XD)
creator: Pescaduten330
